headline: Deere Repair Settlement Puts Customer Access And Valuation In Focus
summary: Deere (NYSE:DE) has reached a settlement agreement resolving multidistrict right to repair litigation. The settlement includes commitments to expand repair access for customers and independent service providers. The agreement adds provisions for supporting users with repair resources and clarifying Deere's repair policies. For you as an investor following Deere, this development is closely related to how the company manages relationships with farmers, contractors, and dealer networks. Deere...
